reviews.review_title: i try the demo  it is great
reviews.review_description: Woooow I'm football player i can say this could be huge game we all waiting for , until we get the full version hope this will be soon
Really fun game and can be very fun and satisfying when you get a great save.

Ok so this game obviously takes inspiration from a very good game on psvr called headmasters. Graphically this is better but what made that game was the brilliant modes. Like the party game mode with the dartboard or the fairground mode and the different environments. 

If this game can provide those sort of modes then it will be a winner for sure. So fingers crossed. 

In terms of physics the heading is fine and goes where I want it. 

The keeper I didn’t like the ball going through my body. I felt that as a keeper you catch it with your hands and body at same time. With the call going through your body it didn’t seem right.

So good demo but what will make this game is the fun modes - If there are some

I'm waiting for the full version.
really fun both game modes, goalkeeper and headball.
Release this now!!! I want the full game!!

reviews.review_title: cant wait for the full version
reviews.review_description: Loved the demo and can't wait for the full version. i'd like loads of different challanges in the full game and an option to play against your mates. so much potential
